1â<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
     2â<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">

    11â

    16â        android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round"
    17â        android:label="ć€èŻ­èšè§éąć­Šäč "
    18â        android:supportsRtl="true"

    21â
    22â        <activity
    23â            android:name=".MainActivity"
    24â            android:exported="true"
    25â            android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize">
    26â            <intent-filter>
    27â                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
    28â                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
    29â            </intent-filter>

    37â

    43â

    49â            <meta-data

    51â                android:resource="@xml/file_paths" />
    52â        </provider>
    53â    </application>
    54â</manifest>
